Export all major spatial deliverables in one step

Source: R/export_spatial_outputs.R
export_spatial_outputs.Rd

Writes recognized spatial and tabular outputs to an output directory.

export_spatial_outputs(
  results,
  out_dir = "outputs",
  gis_format = c("gpkg", "shp", "geojson"),
  table_format = c("csv", "xlsx"),
  overwrite = FALSE,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

results

A named list of spatial/tabular results.

out_dir

Character. Output directory.

gis_format

Character. One of `"gpkg"`, `"shp"`, or `"geojson"`.

table_format

Character. One of `"csv"` or `"xlsx"`.

overwrite

Logical. Whether to overwrite existing files.

verbose

Logical. Whether to print progress messages.

Value

Invisibly returns a named character vector of written file paths.

Contents
